commit.message:
Enable HTTP server request metrics for Prometheus/Grafana

Enable HTTP server observations and histogram distribution so that
http_server_requests_seconds_bucket and _count metrics are exposed
on the actuator/prometheus endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix post creation to use JSON request body instead of query params

Add @RequestBody to FeedController, send content as JSON body in load
test client, and configure Redis ObjectMapper with JavaTimeModule for
proper date serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which
fails on the :ro mounted init-graph.cypher. The file is already
mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement news feed system with fanout architecture

Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 app with Nginx load balancer, Post Service
(PostgreSQL + Redis cache), Fanout Service (RabbitMQ → workers → News Feed
Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

🎯 Keep Cmd+key bindings accurate after switching or renaming tmux sessions

client-focus-in only fires on macOS window focus, not on tmux-internal
session changes. choose-session and rename-session left the Hammerspoon
registry pointing at the old session name, so all Cmd+key bindings
targeted the wrong session.

commit.message:
Auto-fill gold amount from today's price and refresh after adding investment

- api: when gold is saved with amount=0 and grams provided, fetch current
  gold price (karat-adjusted) and set amount_invested = grams × price
- frontend: after adding any investment, trigger price refresh so new
  entry's current_value populates immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(security/task-5): move JWT from localStorage to in-memory only

- api.ts: token held in module-level variable (_token); setAuthToken /
  getAuthToken exported; no localStorage reads/writes for the token
- LoginForm: calls setAuthToken() instead of localStorage.setItem()
- App.tsx: initial token state is '' (no localStorage read); Shell
  receives token as a prop; sign-out clears module var and reloads;
  startup IIFE removes legacy folio_token key and reads folio_theme
  only (non-sensitive, no auth required)
- Settings: writes folio_theme to localStorage when theme changes so
  the startup IIFE can apply it without a network request

Token is never written to localStorage — XSS attacks cannot steal it.
Users must re-authenticate on page refresh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Movement Relationships, Growth Edges, and expanded exemplars to character sheet

Introduces three new character sheet sections to deepen cross-house connections
and add nuance to each archetype profile:

- Movement Relationships: Best Friend, Unlikely Allies, and Intentional Partner
  cards with archetype icons, house colors, and narrative descriptions. Each
  archetype's three relationships span three different houses, ensuring
  cross-pollination across the full movement ecosystem.
- Growth Edge: strengths-based growth paragraph per archetype with house-colored
  left border accent, positioned between Volunteer Roles and Learning Path.
- Third Historical Exemplar: conditional third exemplar with progressive opacity
  fade (primary → secondary → tertiary) in the exemplars section.
- House shadow sides: added shadowSide field to all four houses in houses.js.

New component: MovementRelationships.jsx
Modified: CharacterSheet.jsx, archetypes.js, houses.js

commit.message:
fix: Update C# client for PageHeader proto changes

The proto schema moved sequence information from direct fields on
EventPage/CommandPage into a PageHeader struct. This updates the C#
client library and tests to use the new structure:

- CommandBuilder: Use Header.Sequence instead of direct Sequence
- CompensationContext: Extract source info from angzarr_deferred
- SagaContext/Saga: Use Header.Sequence for next sequence calculation
- UpcasterRouter: Copy Header when creating transformed pages
- Helpers: Add SequenceNum() and SetSequence() helper methods
- Tests: Update all step definitions and unit tests

commit.message:
feat(face): SDF emoji avatar — complete rendering rewrite

Replace the failed parametric 3D mesh with a Signed Distance Function
face drawn entirely in the fragment shader on a single fullscreen quad.

Architecture change:
- DELETE mesh.py (5265-vertex parametric surface → gone)
- REWRITE renderer.py: fullscreen quad + SDF fragment shader
  • Face oval with chin taper + jaw tension
  • Eyes: sclera ellipse + iris/pupil/highlight, clipped by eyelids
  • Eyebrows: tapered line segment SDFs with angle/scrunch control
  • Mouth: parabolic lip arcs with smile/frown curvature + teeth
  • Nose: dot + nostrils with flare control
  • Blush circles driven by cheek_raise
  • Head tilt via UV coordinate rotation
  • Gaze via iris position offset
  • Subtle lighting gradient for depth
- SIMPLIFY expression.py: remove vertex displacement pipeline
  (compute_displacements, _compute_delta, group_cache, head transforms)
  → just lerps ExpressionVector and returns dict for shader uniforms
- UPDATE window.py: remove FaceMesh, 3-line render loop
- SIMPLIFY configs: face.json (colors only), expressions.json (no displacements)

Performance: 63KB GPU upload/frame → 40 bytes (10 float uniforms)
             5265 vertices → 4 vertices, 10240 triangles → 2

ExpressionVector (brain contract) unchanged. All 7 emotion presets intact.
Keyboard controls (1-7, arrows, R, ESC) unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Nihar's buddy <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: retry endpoint routes story requests to correct pipeline

The diag retry endpoint was always calling retry_generation_pipeline_task
(portrait pipeline) even for creative_story requests, causing them to
run through the wrong pipeline and fail at extraction with unrelated
errors. Now checks run_type and dispatches to run_story_pipeline_task
for story requests.

commit.message:
opus-2026-03-08-S50: filler vertex analysis + 4-bad-vertex impossibility + Case 4 deep dive

Key findings:
- Bad vertices always form transitive triple (100% n=5,6,7)
- H1 generators overlap by C(n-2,2) edges (tightly coupled)
- Arc flips cannot create 4th bad vertex
- Case 4 (SC+kappa>=2+b1=0) exists at n>=6 but always has good vertex

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Guard room_mic._callback against silent stream death on exception

Wrap the callback body in try/except so any numpy/FFT error sets
available=False and logs a full traceback instead of silently freezing
state. Without this, sounddevice stops calling the callback while
self._state['available'] remains True, feeding stale data to the AI engine.

commit.message:
fix(golf): handle 'not started' status as WD and re-resolve on admin override

Three related bugs fixed:
1. resolve_pick() now treats status='not started' (player never teed off) the
   same as 'wd' for backup activation when rounds_completed < 2
2. admin_override_pick() clears old resolution state and re-resolves picks for
   completed tournaments, including season usage cleanup and points recalc
3. process_tournament_picks() calls clear_resolution() before re-resolving to
   prevent orphaned SeasonPlayerUsage records on reprocessing

commit.message:
Fix missing bds_k upper-bound validation and sign-time mismatch check (#12, #18) (#59)

Issue #12: keygen/serialize accepted bds_k values exceeding XMSS_MAX_BDS_K
(e.g. bds_k=6 with H=10), causing retain array buffer overflow.

Issue #18: xmss_sign/xmss_mt_sign never validated bds_k at all — a caller
could silently pass a different value than keygen, corrupting BDS state.

Fix: extract shared xmss_bds_k_valid() helper (adds MAX_BDS_K bound check),
store bds_k in xmss_bds_state at keygen/deserialize, and validate +
mismatch-check in all sign/serialize/deserialize entry points.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prefix fallback scene numbers with S to prevent diff collisions

Un-numbered scripts now produce S1, S2, S3 instead of 1, 2, 3 when no
inline or margin-column scene number is present. This makes fallback
numbers visually and programmatically distinct from script-assigned
numbers, preventing false ADDED/OMITTED flags when a scene is inserted
mid-script on re-upload.

Also updates parseSceneNumber regex to handle a leading alpha prefix so
S1, S2, S10 sort numerically rather than lexicographically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Reset AI cost accumulator daily so budget cap applies per calendar day

Previously _total_cost accumulated for the entire process lifetime, causing
MAX_DAILY_COST_USD to silently disable AI for all services after the first
session hit the budget. Now _loop checks the calendar date on every iteration
and resets _total_cost to 0.0 when the date changes, logging the previous
accumulated cost at INFO level.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: BitMart double JSON.stringify bug causing VPS scraper 400

fetchJson() already calls JSON.stringify(opts.body) internally.
BitMart fetcher was pre-stringifying body, causing double-encoding:
"{"url":"..."}" instead of {"url":"..."}. VPS scraper rejected
the malformed JSON with 400.
